title: sub_spec_payload
description: Schema for a single SubSpecPayload entry inside seed_input's sub_specs[] array (v018 Q1 / v020 Q2). Each entry carries the sub-spec's template_name marker and the sub-spec's spec-file content for atomic emission alongside the main spec tree.

template_name.description: Sub-spec directory name under .claude-plugin/specification-templates/<template_name>/. 'livespec', 'minimal', or any user-shipped template name. Used by doctor-static's per-tree applicability dispatch.

files.description: Sub-spec spec-file content. Each entry's path is conventionally SPECIFICATION/templates/<template_name>/<spec-file>; uniformly multi-file (README.md, spec.md, contracts.md, constraints.md, scenarios.md) per v020 Q1.
